plang.note: One more pass than v1 (195 → 196). Still no coder baseline-tests.md so the 21 failures can't be fully triaged, but the count moved in the right direction — coder's v2 changes introduced no new regressions.

summary: v2 PASS. All v1 critical/major findings closed: the build is green (3036/3036 C# tests), the BeforeWrite output-capture path has a bidirectional assertion (output channel captured, error channel excluded), per-step Timings asserts Count==3 in a 3-step entry + 2-step nested sub-goal fixture, OpenAI cost math has exact-decimal positive arithmetic + longest-prefix-wins + multi-call accumulation across the tool-call exit path, CachedTokens is asserted on both success and tool-call exit paths, and the headline %var% slot-description test now uses IsEqualTo so a revert would fail it. Process gap unchanged — no coder/ folder, no baseline-tests.md — flagged but not gating.
